title: Waste collection reminder
problem: Never miss putting the bins out: checks the official Warsaw schedule every evening, messages you only when something is collected tomorrow.

title: Availability / price-tag watcher
problem: A product is sold out and the shop has no notify-me button: watch one element of the page (css selector) and get pinged the moment it changes.

title: Exchange-rate alert (NBP)
problem: Buy euros when they are cheap: polls the Polish central bank's free JSON API hourly and fires once when the rate crosses your threshold.

title: Website uptime monitor
problem: Know your site is down before the users tell you: probes the URL every 5 minutes and alerts on a bad status code.

title: Morning RSS digest
problem: Follow a feed without opening a reader: every new item becomes one Telegram message with the title and link, deduplicated forever.
sample: 📰 Show HN: Potok — workflow engine without a broker\nhttps://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=…

title: GitHub push notification
problem: Pushes to your repo land in Telegram, with the webhook cryptographically verified (HMAC) so nobody can spoof deliveries.
sample: ⬆️ yura -> AntonovYuriy/Potok: fix: validate conditions at create time

title: SSL certificate expiry check
problem: Expired certificates take sites down silently: a daily check reads the served certificate and warns two weeks before it lapses.
